caption: A man wearing a black hoodie with "BOSS TALK" in gold letters, a cream-colored baseball cap, and grey over-ear headphones sits at a table in a studio setting. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone on a boom arm. In the background, a white wall features a logo with the word "HUSTLE" and stars. A blue banner above him contains the text "Where BOSSES Talk!". To his right sits a black mug with red and white text that reads "BOSS TALK OUT LOUD". On the left side of the frame, a small black box with a "BOSS TALK" logo is visible. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a static position, speaking with a focused expression, while the overall scene and equipment remain unchanged.
